LSE-MS7-L3-1400P-MSMATH7-BNB-EUR-01 | MS Math: Grade 7 | Multi-Step Equations and Inequalities | Breaking News Broadcast | European Historical & Contemporary Contexts
The Castle Broadcast
Click 🎧 to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
Why do the reporters need to figure out how many more tickets can still be sold?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART
SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Analyze the relationship the boy establishes between needing an exact number and the action the reporters are about to take. Explain how one makes the other necessary.
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.B.5 | CCSS 7.EE.B.4 | MS Math Grade 7: Multi-Step Equations and Inequalities
